name: White Bean Soup with Sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion.
2. Mince the garlic.
3. Peel and shred the carrots.
4. Dice the tomatoes.
5. Mince the sage to measure 1 tablespoon (or substitute 1 teaspoon dried).
6. Heat oil in a large saucepan until hot.
7. Add onion, garlic, and shredded carrots, and sauté until the onion is tender.
8. Stir in beans with liquid and chicken broth.
9. Stir in tomatoes and sage.
10. Bring to boiling, stirring occasionally.
11. Simmer about 5 minutes, stirring, just to blend flavors.
12. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
13. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
